title: comanthera vernonioides var. minor
intro:
Comanthera vernonioides var. minor, also known as the small Vernonia comanthera, is a plant species in the family Eriocaulaceae. It is a type of flowering plant, which has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. In terms of herbal preparations, Comanthera vernonioides var. minor is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically to alleviate symptoms and promote healing.
